name: Riga (Latvia)

colors.symbolism: the lower field and the city arms

description: Two horizontal stripes — blue over white — with the coat of arms of Riga at the hoist: a city gate with two crossed keys above and a lion's head between, surmounted by a crown.
history: Riga is the capital of Latvia. The flag is divided horizontally blue and white with the city's historic coat of arms.
